summary: Sprint 3 testing completed successfully. All 15 backend API tests pass (100%). Frontend UI testing confirms all Sprint 3 features working: heartbeat system, agent presence list in sidebar, reports panel (daily & weekly), CSV export. Role-based access control verified - agents cannot see presence list or reports.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/presence/heartbeat - 200 OK, updates is_online status
Backend: POST /api/presence/offline - 200 OK, marks user offline
Backend: GET /api/presence/agents - 200 OK, returns agent list with online status
Backend: GET /api/presence/agents - 403 for agents (correct restriction)
Backend: GET /api/reports/daily - 200 OK, returns totals by status and agent
Backend: GET /api/reports/daily?date= - date parameter works correctly
Backend: GET /api/reports/daily - includes per-agent breakdown with hours_worked
Backend: GET /api/reports/daily - 403 for agents (correct restriction)
Backend: GET /api/reports/weekly-hours - 200 OK, returns weekly balance
Backend: GET /api/reports/weekly-hours - includes emitidos, hours_worked, weekly_target, balance
Backend: GET /api/reports/weekly-hours - balance calculation correct (hours - target)
Backend: GET /api/reports/weekly-hours - 403 for agents (correct restriction)
Backend: Heartbeat correctly updates presence in agent list
Backend: Background tasks auto_assign_pending_appointments running
Backend: Background tasks check_presence_and_redistribute running
Frontend: Heartbeat automatically sent on login (detected 2 requests)
Frontend: Agent presence list visible in sidebar for supervisor
Frontend: Presence list shows online/offline count (e.g., '1 de 4 online')
Frontend: Each agent shows online indicator (green) or offline (grey)
Frontend: Reports button visible for supervisor
Frontend: Reports panel opens correctly
Frontend: Daily report shows total appointments, emitidos, hours worked, auto-assigned
Frontend: Daily report shows per-status breakdown
Frontend: Daily report shows per-agent breakdown with emitidos and hours
Frontend: Saldo Semanal button switches to weekly view
Frontend: Weekly hours shows week range, emitidos, trabalhadas, meta, saldo
Frontend: Weekly hours shows online/offline indicator per agent
Frontend: Weekly hours shows progress bar for hours vs target
Frontend: Export CSV button works - downloads CSV file
Frontend: Agent role cannot see presence list (correct restriction)
Frontend: Agent role cannot see reports button (correct restriction)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sprint 3 features all working. Heartbeat sent every 60 seconds via AuthContext. Presence list in Sidebar.js for supervisors only. ReportsPanel has daily and weekly reports with CSV export. Background tasks running: auto_assign_pending_appointments (every 60s) and check_presence_and_redistribute (every 120s). Role-based access control working correctly - agents cannot access presence or reports APIs.

heartbeat_system.presence_timeout: 3 minutes without heartbeat marks user offline

agent_presence_list.shows: Agent name, online/offline status, last seen time

daily_report.shows: total_appointments, by_status, total_hours_worked, auto_assigned, per-agent breakdown

features_verified.csv_export: Works for both daily and weekly reports

background_tasks.auto_assign_pending: Runs every 60s, assigns pending appointments after 5 minutes
background_tasks.presence_check: Runs every 120s, marks offline after 3 min no heartbeat, redistributes appointments
